case_title: TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC VS. TRAVIS MICHAEL EDGAR

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-31-2003 -JUDGMENT UNLAWFUL DETAINER REPORTED ON THE COURT RECORD IRVING PFEFFER, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; VALERIE PAPALE, CSR. #6899.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL AS TO PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-04-2003 - CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT--UNLAWFUL DETAINER, PLACED ON THE RECORD AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. IRVING PFEFFER, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK; VALERIE PAPALE, CSR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 144 EDDY STREET ROOM #316 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,336.70 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,336.70, STAYED UNTIL AUG-26-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT IF DEFENDANT VACATES BY NOON OF THE DAY SET FORTH 8/26/03, PLAINTIFF WITH STIPULATE TO SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL, PROVIDED DEFENDANT PREPARES THE DOCUMENTS. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL
NOTICE THOMAS P WRIGHT, JR UNAVAILABLE JULY 21 THRU JULY 30 2003
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.71 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT EDGAR, TRAVIS MICHAEL ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
